name: P4 Final Closure Automated Audit
goal: Re-check original PRD experience paths and P4 UX gates with real browser screenshots, without claiming human acceptance or real external-provider acceptance.
targetArchitecture: Original PRD: Chatbox-first local workspace for profile, JD, application package, interview preparation, realtime text hint, and review flows.
P4 UX layer: suggested prompts, visible mode/provider state, conversation plane, workbench/artifact rail, responsive desktop/mobile layout.
P4C-FC layer: local/mock continuous dialogue, status/next-step replies, explicit tool execution, and chat session restore.
Evidence layer: Chrome/CDP screenshot automation with viewport cleanup and HTML reporting.
currentImplementation: FastAPI exposes workspace, files, profile, job, application, interview, realtime, artifact, chat, provider, and guided workflow APIs.
React/Vite Chatbox initializes a local workspace, restores latest chat sessions, and labels provider/privacy state.
KeywordChatCore is the default local/mock chat router; explicit intents call Domain Tools, free chat does not call a provider.
SQLite local workspace persists documents, artifacts, versions, sessions, tool logs, and exports.
acceptanceCriteria: P4 desktop workbench renders without layout-collapse evidence at 1200, 1440, 1600, and 1920 widths.
P4 narrow/mobile states keep core input and workbench access reachable at 720 and 390 widths.
The guided example path can complete and display generated outputs in the workbench.
P4C-FC can complete two free dialogue turns, a status query, explicit profile extraction, and session restore.
The report must separate automated evidence from human experience acceptance.
The report must not claim real personal data, real external provider, ASR, meeting platform, auto-apply, or SaaS acceptance.

commandResults.evidence: TypeScript and Vite production build passed
Older P4/P4B/P4C reports still contain historical test-count snapshots; final closure uses current 71 passed result

prdReview.requirement: Original PRD path A-F: local workspace, profile/JD/package/interview/realtime/review capabilities remain represented by APIs and regression tests.
prdReview.evidence: Full pytest suite plus guided workflow browser evidence; final audit document maps PRD paths to tests and current limits.

prdReview.requirement: P4: user can understand first step from Chatbox without reading developer docs.
prdReview.evidence: Initial desktop and mobile screenshots show suggested prompts, local state, provider boundary, and workbench empty state.

prdReview.requirement: P4: workbench/artifact cards are separate from conversation and human-readable.
prdReview.evidence: Guided example completion screenshot shows generated workflow output and workbench access.

prdReview.requirement: P4C-FC: free local dialogue must not force artifact writes; explicit tool intent still writes artifacts.
prdReview.evidence: Free-chat screenshots and explicit profile extraction screenshot in this run.

prdReview.requirement: P4 final gate requires human experience review.
prdReview.evidence: This is an automated audit only.

codeReview.finding: Free local dialogue, decline-to-execute phrases, status query, next-step query, and explicit tool intents are separated and covered by eval tests.
Chatbox remains a browser client over API routes, exposes local/provider state, suggested prompts, loading state, error recovery, upload, and session restore.
Desktop three-column workbench and mobile drawer/composer layout are evidenced by screenshots; 390px send and workbench buttons are both reachable.
Chrome/CDP runner captures screenshots and clears viewport emulation in finally; report now renders command, PRD, code, and documentation audit sections.
Not implemented in P4; correctly remains P6 opt-in and is not claimed by code or report.

documentationAudit.area: Original PRD v1.0 vs active P4 PRD
documentationAudit.finding: Original product paths A-F remain the full product reference; P4 docs correctly scope the current stage to UX hardening and local/mock continuous dialogue.
P4 gates cover regression, empty state, feedback, workbench, provider/privacy, responsive screenshots, reports, and human review boundary.
Docs consistently warn not to claim P4B/P4C human acceptance or real external-provider default acceptance.
Earlier P4/P4B/P4C reports still preserve historical test counts; this final closure report is the current source of truth for the 71-test run.

unverifiedScope: No real personal profile, raw private resume, raw private JD, or transcript was used.
No real external provider call was made.
No ASR, meeting platform, automatic application, SaaS login, billing, or multi-tenant path was tested.
This report does not decide final human UX approval.
auditOpinion: If every step passes and the linked regression commands pass, P4 automated closure evidence is sufficient for a human review checkpoint. It is not sufficient for productization, real-data, external-provider, or human acceptance claims.

steps.name: Fill free follow-up
steps.value: 继续，我下一步应该先补 React 还是项目经历？

steps.name: Wait next-step reply
steps.text: 下一步可以上传简历/项目资料

steps.name: Fill status query
steps.value: 当前进展如何？有哪些产物？

steps.name: Wait status query
steps.text: 当前还没有生成求职产物

steps.name: Fill explicit tool request
steps.value: 请整理资料，生成职业事实。

steps.name: Wait restored mobile conversation
steps.text: 请整理资料，生成职业事实
